achievements.title: This is where it really begins
achievements.description: Repair and input your first Digi-Plate
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Don't go on your own!
achievements.description: Find Hiroyuki after he disappears
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Now what?
achievements.description: Finish Palace Laboratory
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Mind control lifted
achievements.description: Defeat the East City Leader
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Only one thing left to do...
achievements.description: Give Yui the special medicine
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Savior of the Digital World!
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss and finish the game
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: No one left behind!
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss without having any Digimon die throughout the fight
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: I don't need rest, I need answers...
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss saving the game no more than 20 times
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Genocider
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss without ever escaping from battle
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Legendary Level!
achievements.description: Become a Legend Rank Tamer
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Blast from the Past!
achievements.description: Pass the Legend Rank Tamer test with only Chronomon (Holy Mode), Apollomon and Dianamon.
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Break the Chain
achievements.description: Obtain your first Ultimate 2 Digimon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Perfectionist
achievements.description: Have a Digimon with the highest Max Aptitude
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Going all the way
achievements.description: Have a Digimon reach Level 99
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Ultimate Strength
achievements.description: Have a Level 99 Digimon with max stats (Excluding Friendship and Aptitude, but including Max Aptitude)
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Ultimate Team
achievements.description: Have 3 Level 99 Digimon with max stats (Excluding Friendship and Aptitude, but including Max Aptitude)
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Why is this locked?
achievements.description: Talk to Valkyrimon in Tamer Town and input all the passwords
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Octotastic!
achievements.description: Obtain all items from Octomon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: A Reward fitting for a Legend
achievements.description: Get all rewards from Darkdramon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Exploration Ready
achievements.description: Place a Digimon in the Exploration Team
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Gear, check!
achievements.description: Buy and upgrade all Digi-Plate repairng tools
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Repair Novice
achievements.description: Restore 30% of the Evolution Tree
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Repairman
achievements.description: Restore 60% of the Evolution Tree
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Repair Expert
achievements.description: Restore 85% of the Evolution Tree
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Repair Master
achievements.description: Restore 100% of the Evolution Tree
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Digimon Apprentice
achievements.description: Register 100 Digimon in the Digimon Scan
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Digimon Teacher
achievements.description: Register 200 Digimon in the Digimon Scan
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Digimon Researcher
achievements.description: Register 275 Digimon in the Digimon Scan
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Digimon Master
achievements.description: Register all 314 Digimon in the Digimon Scan
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: A good deed a day
achievements.description: Finish every 1* & 2* Quest
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Lending a helping hand
achievements.description: Finish every 3* Quest
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Can't leave them alone
achievements.description: Finish every 4* Quest
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: The power to help
achievements.description: Finish every 5* Quest
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Supreme Helper
achievements.description: Finish every 6* Quest
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: I'll be done before you know it!
achievements.description: Defeat all Enemy Chests from TigerVespamon's Quest in one session
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: One Final Challenge
achievements.description: Finish Rosemon (Burst Mode)'s Quest in one session, without using items in battle.
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.description: Buy every Level 1 Terrain Board and BGM Board for a Farm

achievements.description: Have a Digi-Farm with a Max Level Dragon Terrain Board and BGM Board installed (Don't save reset before installing it)

achievements.title: Novice Digi-Explorer
achievements.description: Go from Shadow Hell's Digi-Port to Pixel Desert's Digi-Port, or viceversa [One session, No Digi-Ship]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Advanced Digi-Explorer
achievements.description: Go from Palace Laboratory's last room to Loop Swamp's last room [One session, After Palace Laboratory final boss, Fewest screen changes, No Digi-Ship, No Gate Disk]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Expert Digi-Explorer
achievements.description: Go from Angler Tunnel's Digi-Port to Wizard's Temple Digi-Port, or viceversa [One session, Fewest screen changes, No escaping, No Digi-Ship]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Master Digi-Explorer
achievements.description: Walk from Task Canyon's N Digi-Port to Proxy Island's W Digi-Port [One session, Post-Game only, Fewest screen changes, No escaping, No Dig or Dive, No Digi-Ship]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Evolution Tree 1 - Tactician of Light and Darkness
achievements.description: Have an Angewomon or a LadyDevimon with the attacks Heaven's Charm, Holy Arrow and Darkness Wave
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Evolution Tree 2 - Composite Destruction
achievements.description: Have a Kimeramon with the attacks Mega Flame, Freeze Fang, Heaven's Knuckle and Scissor Arms [Nova Blast, Sub-Zero Ice Fang, Hand of Fate and Scissor Claw]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Evolution Tree 3 - Dragons of Justice
achievements.description: Have a WarGreymon, Imperialdramon, Dukemon [Gallantmon] or ShineGreymon with the attacks Great Tornado, Mega Death, FIN Elysion and Glorious Burst [Terra Force, Shield of the Just, Mega Crusher, and Glorious Burst]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Evolution Tree 4 - The Ultimate Digi-Entelechy
achievements.description: Have a Culumon [Calumon] with the attacks Sourai, Kongou, Kouen and Mugen [Aurora Force, Vajra, Crimson Blaze and Infinity]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: A Perfect Test
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Register Jungle with only MegaloGrowlmon [WarGrowlmon], Rapidmon and Taomon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Battle of the Mechs
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Palace Laboratory with only MetalGarurumon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Fight for Supremacy
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Shadow Hell with only MetalGreymon, RiseGreymon and SkullGreymon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: We can fight, too!
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Task Canyon with only AncientBeatmon [AncientBeetlemon], AncientIrismon and AncientMegatheriumon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Stop Millenniumon!
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Thriller Ruins with only Monodramon, Goddramon [Goldramon] and Holydramon [Magnadramon]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Deep Lurkers
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Proxy Island with only Aegisdramon, AncientMermaimon and MarineAngemon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: History repeats itself
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Risk Factory with only Susanoomon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: The Beauty and the Wolf
achievements.description: Defeat the Enemy Chest in Risk Cave with only a MirageGaogamon and another Digimon, without the MirageGaogamon dying
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: The Alpha, the Omega, and the rest
achievements.description: Defeat the Karatenmon, Alphamon and Anubimon [Anubismon] Chest in Chrome Mine with only Omegamon [Omnimon], Yatagaramon and Pharaohmon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: Attack vs Defense
achievements.description: Defeat the Magnamon, Vikemon and Craniummon Chest in Chrome Mine with only Shadramon, HeracleKabuterimon [HerculesKabuterimon] and Examon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: The Other Side
achievements.description: Defeat the Seraphimon, Baihumon and Xuanwumon [Ebonwumon] Enemy Chest in Chrome Mine with only Ophanimon, Qinglongmon [Azulongmon] and Zhuqiaomon
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: You can't beat the original!
achievements.description: Defeat the Lilithmon and Mugendramon [Machinedramon] Enemy Chest in Class Desert with only LadyDevimon and Kimeramon [Chimairamon]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: No Mind Control here
achievements.description: Defeat the Zhuqiaomon Enemy Chest in Class Desert with only Cherubimon (Zen) [Cherubimon (Good)], Seraphimon and SlashAngemon [GrdiAngemon]
achievements.author: Dreaker

achievements.title: The tables have turned
achievements.description: Defeat the Kuramon, Imperialdramon (Paladin Mode) and Qinglongmon [Azulongmon] Enemy Chest in Class Desert with only Armagemon [Armageddemon], Chicomon [Chibomon] and Minomon
achievements.author: Dreaker
